TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Leandro_Barbosa, title = Leandro_Barbosa, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Leandro_Barbosa} }

S.FORM: Leandro Barbosa hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'aras mari' tpucing tay suruw. kawas tay 1982, ryax sa tay 28 nqu tay 11, Leandro Barbosa, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Leandro Barbosa hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'aras mari' tpucing tay suruw. kawas tay 1982, ryax sa tay 28 nqu tay 11, Leandro Barbosa, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: lean*ro βarβos~ɕa ħjaʔɣa nβa pɣnawʔ mariʔ mis~ɕuw qanij, qutux s~ɕa pʔaras~ɕ mariʔ tpuʦ~ʨiŋ taj s~ɕuruw. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, lean*ro βarβos~ɕa, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
